# SuperCon Database

**Source:** MDR SuperCon Datasheet Ver.240322  
**DOI:** https://doi.org/10.48505/nims.3837  
**License:** CC BY 4.0  
**Publisher:** National Institute for Materials Science (NIMS)

## Citation

Materials Database Group. MDR SuperCon Datasheet Ver.240322. 
https://doi.org/10.48505/nims.3837

## Contents

This directory contains a snapshot of the SuperCon database downloaded on 2025-12-08.
The data is archived here to ensure long-term reproducibility of the analyses in this study.

**Main data file:** `primary.tsv` (~26,000 superconducting materials with Tc values and references)

**Documentation:** `SuperCon_ReadMe_en.pdf`

## Usage

The script `scripts/find_relevant_SCs.py` uses this data automatically. 
See `scripts/README.md` for usage instructions.
